home.title: GamesPump
home.subtitle: Party Games. Instant Fun.
home.tagline: No signup. No downloads. Pick a name. Play with friends.
home.shareText: 🎮 Free party games — no signup, no downloads. Just play!
common.roomEndedDesc: The game session is no longer available.
join.title: Join Game
game.quick-draw.name: Quick Draw
game.quick-draw.desc: Draw prompts and guess what others drew. Fast rounds, big laughs.
game.word-blitz.name: Word Blitz
game.word-blitz.desc: Race to find words that match the category before time runs out.
game.trivia-clash.name: Trivia Clash
game.trivia-clash.desc: Test your knowledge in rapid-fire trivia battles across categories.
game.memory-match.name: Memory Match
game.memory-match.desc: Flip cards and find matching pairs. Best memory wins!
game.this-or-that.name: This or That
game.this-or-that.desc: Pick between two options. Match the majority to score!
game.speed-math.name: Speed Math
game.speed-math.desc: Race to solve math problems. Fastest correct answer wins!
game.emoji-battle.name: Emoji Battle
game.emoji-battle.desc: Spot the matching emoji in a sea of look-alikes. Speed and accuracy win!
game.reaction-speed.name: Reaction Speed
game.reaction-speed.desc: Wait for green, tap fast! Test your reflexes against friends.
game.lie-detector.name: Lie Detector
game.lie-detector.desc: One player speaks, the rest guess — truth or lie? Fool your friends to win!
game.color-chaos.name: Color Chaos
game.color-chaos.desc: The word says one color, the ink says another — tap the INK color! Don't get tricked.
share.challenge: 🎮 I just scored {score} in {game}! Can you beat me?
share.invite: 🎮 Play party games with me! No signup needed.
share.joinRoom: 🎮 Join room {code} on GamesPump — no signup needed!
game.trivia.question: Question {current} of {total}
game.wordblitz.startTyping: Start typing words using the letters above
game.liedetector.makeStatement: Tell the group something — it can be true OR a lie
game.colorchaos.tapInkColor: Tap the INK color, not the word!
lobby.shareText: 🎮 Join room {code} on GamesPump — no signup needed!
rules.trivia-clash.1: Answer trivia questions before time runs out.
rules.trivia-clash.2: Faster correct answers score more points.
rules.trivia-clash.scoring: Up to 1000 pts per question — speed matters!
rules.word-blitz.1: Type words that match the given letters.
rules.word-blitz.3: Longer words score more. You have 30 seconds per round.
rules.quick-draw.2: First correct guess scores the most.
rules.quick-draw.3: The drawer scores when someone guesses correctly.
rules.quick-draw.scoring: Faster guesses = more points for guesser and drawer.
rules.memory-match.3: Remember card positions — most pairs wins.
rules.this-or-that.scoring: Match the crowd to earn points each round.
rules.speed-math.2: First correct answer scores the most.
rules.speed-math.scoring: Up to 500 pts — only speed and accuracy win.
rules.emoji-battle.1: Find the matching emoji in a 3x3 grid.
rules.emoji-battle.2: Tap the right one as fast as you can.
rules.reaction-speed.1: Wait for the screen to turn GREEN.
rules.reaction-speed.2: Tap as fast as you can when you see green!
rules.reaction-speed.3: Tapping too early is a false start: -50 points.
rules.color-chaos.1: A color WORD is shown in a DIFFERENT ink color.
rules.color-chaos.2: Tap the button matching the INK color, not the word!
rules.color-chaos.3: You have 8 seconds per round — speed earns bonus points.
rules.lie-detector.1: Each player takes a turn as the speaker.
rules.lie-detector.2: The speaker makes a statement — true or a lie.
rules.lie-detector.3: Everyone else votes: is it truth or a lie?
rules.lie-detector.4: Correct guessers earn points. The speaker earns points for fooling people!
rules.lie-detector.scoring: Correct guess = 100pts + speed bonus. Speaker = 50pts per player fooled.
